Article: Japanese Science Fiction in Converging Media
[]: Japanese Science Fiction in Converging Media             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Aug 19, 2013 5:54 pm Japanese Science Fiction in Converging Media: Alienation and Neon Genesis Evangelion Carl Li, Mari Nakamura, and Martin Roth (April 2013) gwern posted a link to this paper over at the EML: http://www.asiascape.org/resources/publications/asiascape-ops6.pdf It's about 13 pages long, but an interesting academic paper and worth at least a read.
